narrative_beat: Abertura invasiva — a IA invade o espaço pessoal do espectador, braço mecânico avançando direto para a câmera como presença ameaçadora

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.depth_of_field: sharp hand and forearm, background heavily blurred

subject.primary: robotic golden-crimson mechanical hand reaching directly toward camera lens, fingers spread wide, joints articulated with exposed servo motors glowing amber
subject.focal_point: fingertips closest to camera, slight motion blur on edges
subject.secondary: forearm of polished crimson chrome with intricate circuit etchings in gold filigree
props: gold circuit-board etchings on wrist plate

environment.atmosphere: oppressive, mechanical, invasive — the machine has no hesitation

composition.rule: centered aggressive — subject fills 70% of frame, Ken Burns slow push-in
composition.foreground: robotic hand in crimson and gold occupying center frame
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white factory assembly line with robotic arms frozen mid-motion, harsh industrial fluorescent lighting

lighting.key_light: single amber spotlight from upper-left, raking across mechanical knuckles creating deep shadows
lighting.fill_light: cold desaturated fill from background factory lights, barely reaching subject
lighting.rim_light: thin crimson rim along outer edge of fingers and forearm

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: dread, violation of personal space, inevitability

symbolism.primary: the mechanical hand reaching out represents AI claiming dominion over humanity
symbolism.secondary: amber-glowing servo joints echo the fires of creation turned against the creator

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
